title: henckelia caelestis
intro: Henckelia caelestis, also known as the 'Heavenly Blue' or 'Blue Henckelia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats of India, where it grows as a perennial herb in the wild. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. Henckelia caelestis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function.
